characters.appearance: Female in her 30s with a slim build and fair complexion. She has short, brown hair swept back from her face. Her facial features are clear and expressive.
characters.wardrobe: A light grey-green, long-sleeved button-down shirt.

scenes.supernova_script: Character A says: मेरे साथ ज़ोर से बोलिए। 'Thirty-three'. [Say this out loud with me. 'Thirty-three'.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Hooks the viewer immediately with an interactive speaking exercise.
- Establishes a warm, instructional tone.
- Sets up the core premise of practicing pronunciation.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text:
SUPERNOVA
say this out loud with me
THIRTY-THREE

scenes.supernova_script: Character A says: अगर आपने 'tirty-tree' बोला, तो problem आपके 'TH' sound में है। घबराइए मत! [If you said 'tirty-tree', then the problem is in your 'TH' sound. Don't worry!]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Identifies a highly relatable pronunciation mistake for Indian speakers.
- Validates the user's struggle without making them feel embarrassed.
- Transitions smoothly into the solution.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text:
IF YOU SAID
TIRTY-TREE
THEN IT'S YOUR TH SOUND

scenes.supernova_script: Character A says: इसे fix करना बहुत आसान है। अपनी tongue को ऊपर के दाँतों से लगाएँ, और हवा बाहर छोड़ें। 'Thirty-three'. [It's very easy to fix. Place your tongue against your upper teeth, and let the air out. 'Thirty-three'.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Provides a clear, actionable tip in a mix of Hindi and English.
- Demonstrates the brand's practical, easy-to-understand teaching style.
- Gives the user an immediate 'aha' moment and a quick win.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text:
HERE'S HOW TO FIX IT
TONGUE TIP TO YOUR UPPER TEETH
PUSH AIR OUT
THIRTY-THREE

scenes.supernova_script: Character A says: Supernova के AI tutor के साथ आज ही अपनी English speaking practice शुरू करें। [Start your English speaking practice today with Supernova's AI tutor.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Delivers a strong, clear CTA to download the app.
- Highlights the AI tutor feature for daily practice.
- Removes the 'free' claim to align with Supernova's premium positioning.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text:
Supernova
START YOUR ENGLISH SPEAKING PRACTICE TODAY
